must_do.full_text:
This is the moment Chinese AI beat American AI.

One of the largest public crypto companies in the world just DUMPED OpenAI and Anthropic.

Coinbase switched to open-weight Chinese models from Zhipu and DeepSeek, and shaved nearly 50% off the company's internal AI spending.

The https://t.co/EStCy2285Y
must_do.summary: Coinbase弃用OpenAI/Anthropic，转向Zhipu和DeepSeek中国开源模型，节省50%AI成本。这是AI产业格局的重大转变。
angles: Coinbase弃OpenAI｜中国AI模型逆袭
成本下降50%｜开源模型改写产业格局
美国AI垄断破裂｜DeepSeek/Zhipu崛起

must_do.full_text:
KARPATHY JUST KILLED THE PROMPT ERA WITH A SINGLE DOCUMENT

prompts are easy. loops are hard. and writing fifty prompts a day is the work nobody does twice.

he shifts the burden to the harness.

you define the contract once. the model writes, reviews, restarts, and reconciles. https://t.co/cetaSHDu1m
must_do.summary: Karpathy发布文档，提出Prompt时代已终结，强调循环和系统设计优于单个Prompt。AI观点/趋势，信息差中等。
angles: Karpathy宣布：Prompt时代终结了
为什么写50个Prompt不如设计一个系统
从Prompt到Loop：AI工程的范式转变

must_do.full_text: Codex team is in a warroom on a Sunday combing through logs and checking whether there is anything that could lead to increased usage drains for some users. Taking it very seriously and won't rest until we get to the bottom of it.

must_do.full_text:
GLM-5.2 is the open-source Claude moment.

The demand we’re seeing at Databricks is astonishing. The world is going to see massive adoption of oss LLMs.

Also, more companies will shift toward post-training their own models on top of oss models and owning the weights.
must_do.summary: GLM-5.2被称为开源Claude时刻，Databricks观察到开源LLM需求激增，企业将转向基于开源模型的后训练，掌握自有权重。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：'开源Claude时刻'的里程碑表述
反常识/意外性：大厂从闭源转向开源生态
angles: GLM-5.2=开源Claude时刻，大模型格局要变天
Databricks爆料：企业疯狂涌入开源LLM赛道
后训练+自有权重，企业AI自主权觉醒

- Backflipping Boston Dynamics and Unitree
